projectDescription: Jarvis chat + Builder + Desktop Voice Agent — monorepo backlog (auto-sync from scripts/linear-backlog.json)

issues.title: [DONE] P1–P21 Foundation — chat, builder, sessions, memory, CI
issues.description:
## Hotové
- Build pipeline, orchestrátor, telemetry, multi-session chat
- Server-side builder unlock (`BUILDER_UNLOCK_PASSWORD` env)
- iPhone 17 Air QA, PWA, CI (test → e2e → build → lint)
- Story nudge, lokálne zvuky, export ZIP/backup
- Supabase auth + session/memory cloud sync
- 260+ Vitest, 15+ Playwright E2E

**Produkcia:** https://jarvis-ten-omega.vercel.app/chat

issues.title: [DONE] P21 Desktop Voice Agent — Gemini Live + 18 macOS tools
issues.description:
## Hotové
- PyQt6 UI, FastAPI health `:8765`, web bridge badge + voice panel
- `shared/tool-manifest.json` (18 tools vrátane `agent_task`)
- Desktop auth export → `~/.jarvis/desktop-auth.json`
- Memory sync E2E (local + Vercel)
- `pnpm desktop:setup|run|stack|health`

issues.title: [DONE] Builder stream fix — Maximum update depth exceeded
issues.description:
## Oprava
- RAF-throttled `setMessages` počas streamu
- Skip persist/cloud sync počas `isStreaming`
- `messagesRef` v `sendMessage` deps
- Regresný test multi-chunk builder stream

**Commit:** `880aa65`

issues.title: [DONE] HTML auto-repair — useknutý dokument, script, @media
issues.description:
## Oprava
- `repairJarvisHtmlArtifact()` po každom stream round
- Doplní `</html>`, `<script>`, viewport, `@media`, touch sizing
- Kombinovaný refinement prompt (structural + mobile)

**Commit:** `8618624`

issues.title: [DONE] Iron Man JARVIS voice — Schedar + Daniel + EN/SK alternation
issues.description:
## Finálny hlas
- Gemini Live: **Schedar** (even, calm)
- macOS TTS: **Daniel** (British)
- Každé druhé slovo EN/SK v audio odpovediach
- `pnpm desktop:voice-smoke`

**Commit:** `2054119`

issues.title: [DONE] macOS JARVIS.app — spustenie z Applications/Dock
issues.description:
## Hotové
- `pnpm desktop:app` → `~/Applications/JARVIS.app`
- Ikona `jarvis-desktop-icon.png` → `.icns`
- Launcher používa `.venv/bin/python` (nie systémový Python)
- `desktop-agent/run.sh`

issues.title: [TODO] JARVIS ikony — commit + deploy na Vercel
issues.description:
## Stav
- Lokálne vygenerované: `public/icons/jarvis-mobile-*`, `jarvis-desktop-*`
- `pnpm icons:generate`
- **Ešte necommitnuté** na `main` / produkcia bez nových ikon

## Kroky
1. `pnpm icons:generate`
2. Commit `public/icons/`, `site.webmanifest`, `layout.tsx`
3. Push → overiť PWA na iPhone

issues.title: [TODO] Desktop — PyQt6 setup overlay: Mistral namiesto OpenRouter

issues.description: Desktop UI v menu len pri `cloudSyncEnabled`. Zobraziť badge/panel aj bez Supabase (offline health only).

issues.title: [TODO] Auth export — refresh_token + auto-renew JWT
issues.description: Po expirácii JWT treba znova exportovať `desktop-auth.json`. Pridať refresh flow.

issues.description: Preview deployments nemusia mať rovnaké env ako Production. Audit cez `pnpm audit:vercel-env:full`.

issues.title: [TODO] /api/desktop-agent/status — použiť v health-client

issues.title: [TODO] Builder P2 — Diff-based Snapshot Timeline s A/B preview
issues.description:
## Čo
Horizontálna time-lane so screenshotom každého snapshotu; hover = mini-preview; klik = split-view before/after so zvýraznenými zmenami.

## Ako
1. Rozšíriť IndexedDB (`JarvisBuildHistory` v3 alebo `JarvisSnapshots`) o `html` + `thumbnailBlob`
2. Po builde: uložiť HTML + `html2canvas` thumbnail
3. Prepojiť `JarvisDeckSnapshot` + `diffJarvisText()` z `jarvis-workspace.ts`; DOM diff cez `diff-dom`
4. Nový `snapshot-timeline.tsx`; wire `isViewingSnapshot` v `chat-shell.tsx`

**Deps:** `html2canvas`, `diff-dom`

issues.title: [TODO] Builder P2 — Prompt-to-Component Library (local RAG)
issues.description:
## Čo
Pinované úspešné snapshoty → lokálny embedding index; pri novom prompte top-3 few-shot examples.

## Závislosti
Snapshot Timeline (#1) — HTML storage + pin UI

## Ako
1. `lib/rag/local-embedding-index.ts` — `@xenova/transformers` MiniLM v IndexedDB
2. `build-pipeline.ts`: `retrieveTopK(prompt, 3)` pred planner fázou
3. Pin/unpin ikona na timeline karte

**Deps:** `@xenova/transformers` (Web Worker)

issues.title: [TODO] Builder P2 — Multi-Artifact Workspace (mini pages)
issues.description:
## Čo
Viac HTML artefaktov per session (index, about, pricing) — taby v preview, auto-linking cez postMessage router, ZIP export.

## Ako
1. Rozšíriť `ChatSession` o `artifacts[]` v `chat-sessions.ts`
2. Tab bar v preview paneli
3. `lib/artifact-router.ts` — intercept `<a href>` v sandboxe
4. Rozšíriť `project-zip-export.ts` pre viac `.html` súborov

issues.title: [TODO] Builder P3 — Sandbox Runtime Inspector
issues.description:
## Čo
Console + Network overlay pre sandbox iframe — `console.*`, errors, fetch/XHR, performance markery.

## Ako
1. Wire `onConsoleEntry` / `onNavigationEntry` v `chat-shell.tsx`
2. Rozšíriť `preview-console-bridge.ts`: `onerror`, `fetch`/`XHR` patch, `performance.mark`
3. Nový `runtime-inspector-panel.tsx` — záložka vedľa Preview/Code
4. `event.origin` validácia na parent listener

issues.title: [TODO] Builder P3 — Fix it self-heal loop
issues.description:
## Čo
One-click „Ask Jarvis to fix“ pri runtime error/CSP violation → follow-up do modelu → nahradí artefakt + auto-snapshot. Retry limit 3.

## Závislosti
Runtime Inspector (#4)

## Ako
1. „Fix it“ tlačidlo v `runtime-inspector-panel.tsx`
2. `lib/chat/self-heal.ts` — error stack + HTML slice → follow-up prompt
3. Build flow v `chat-shell.tsx` s `retryCount` (max 3)
4. Po úspechu: auto-snapshot (#1)
